articles.title: This Ashland mom is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for children with complex medical needs and their parents
articles.description:
Mengyuan Flanagan is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for the Michael Lisnow Respite Center.

The post This Ashland mom is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for children with complex medical needs and their parents appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mengyuan Flanagan is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support families with complex medical needs.
Funds raised will benefit the Michael Lisnow Respite Center, aiding local Boston families.
The marathon will raise awareness and support for children's medical challenges in the community.

articles.title: Western Mass. couple found guilty of manslaughter in death of foster child
articles.description:
“The child should be celebrating his seventh birthday next month,” prosecutors said. “Instead, he died at just ten months old…”

The post Western Mass. couple found guilty of manslaughter in death of foster child appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Western Massachusetts couple convicted of manslaughter for death of their foster child.
The child, who died at ten months old, was due to celebrate his seventh birthday next month.
This case highlights ongoing concerns about child welfare and foster care safety in Massachusetts.

articles.title: Major water main break in Jackson Square floods streets, causes detours
articles.description:
Drivers and pedestrians were asked to avoid the area Tuesday afternoon due to flooding at the intersection in Jamaica Plain.

The post Major water main break in Jackson Square floods streets, causes detours appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Major water main break occurred in Jackson Square, flooding streets on Tuesday afternoon.
Drivers and pedestrians are advised to avoid the intersection in Jamaica Plain.
Flooding has caused significant detours for local traffic and public transportation.

articles.title: Why Jaylen Waddle’s trade to Broncos is bad news for the Patriots
articles.description:
Given the price the Broncos paid to acquire Waddle, the Patriots might have to give up at least a first-round pick to acquire A.J. Brown.

The post Why Jaylen Waddle’s trade to Broncos is bad news for the Patriots appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Broncos traded for Jaylen Waddle, raising trade values for top receivers.
Patriots may need to offer a first-round pick for A.J. Brown.
Increased trade costs could hinder Patriots' ability to strengthen their roster.

articles.title: 2 charged after car hits pedestrians outside of downtown Boston nightclub
articles.description:
Darius Boyce, 45, and Maria Moreas, 25, face criminal charges after allegedly hitting three people with a Jeep Wrangler, prosecutors said.

The post 2 charged after car hits pedestrians outside of downtown Boston nightclub appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Darius Boyce, 45, and Maria Moreas, 25, charged after hitting three pedestrians.
Incident occurred outside a downtown Boston nightclub, raising safety concerns.
Prosecutors emphasize the need for stricter traffic regulations in nightlife areas.

articles.title: US drivers see gas prices jump to their highest level since 2023 as the Iran war drags on
articles.description:
According to AAA, the national average for a gallon of regular gasoline jumped to $3.79 on Tuesday, up from $2.98 consumers were paying before the US and Israel launched the war with joint attacks against Iran on Feb. 28.

The post US drivers see gas prices jump to their highest level since 2023 as the Iran war drags on appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gas prices in Boston rise to $3.79 per gallon, highest since 2023.
AAA reports a significant increase from $2.98 prior to February 28.
Local residents face increased commuting costs due to ongoing Iran conflict.

articles.title: Former President Biden makes surprise St. Patrick’s Day appearance in Boston
articles.description:
Giving a speech in his unscheduled appearance, Biden spoke about immigrant experiences and Irish American history.

The post Former President Biden makes surprise St. Patrick’s Day appearance in Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former President Biden made a surprise appearance in Boston on March 17.
Biden spoke about immigrant experiences and Irish American history during his speech.
The visit highlights Boston's rich Irish heritage and strengthens community ties.

articles.title: 2 Boston College students injured in deck collapse during off-campus party
articles.description:
The deck had rotting wood which appeared to have been painted over, Boston police officers wrote after the Brighton incident.

The post 2 Boston College students injured in deck collapse during off-campus party appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two Boston College students were injured in a deck collapse during an off-campus party.
The deck was found to have rotting wood, potentially endangering more students.
This incident raises concerns about safety regulations for off-campus housing in Brighton.
